title: vSkill Studio — Update Notifications UI (Row Indicator, Section Badge, TopRail Bell, Detail CTA)
supersededReason: 0708 delivers the same row-indicator / section-badge / TopRail-bell / detail-CTA surface via an SSE push pipeline (AC-US5-01..11). The 0683 5-minute polling cadence is now the fallback branch of useSkillUpdates() (AC-US5-05) rather than the primary path (AC-US5-06).
description: UI-only integration of existing update-detection backend (GET /api/skills/updates + POST /api/skills/:plugin/:skill/update SSE + POST /api/skills/batch-update SSE) into the main vskill studio chrome. Adds four visible affordances: (1) subtle `↑` glyph on sidebar rows when `updateAvailable`, colored --color-own (warm amber); (2) section-header count badge 'Installed · Claude · N updates ▾' with click-through to the existing UpdatesPanel route; (3) TopRail bell icon with count badge and dropdown summary of outdated skills plus 'View all' link to UpdatesPanel; (4) RightPanel 'Update to X.Y.Z' button wired through useOptimisticAction with inline SSE progress and existing ChangelogViewer preview. Introduces a visibility-aware polling hook `useSkillUpdates()` (5 min cadence, pause when `document.visibilityState === 'hidden'`, debounce + dedup per session, manual refresh). No backend changes — purely consumes existing endpoints and existing components (useOptimisticAction from 0674 T-053, ChangelogViewer, UpdatesPanel). Icons consumed from src/eval-ui/src/assets/icons/*.svg (update-bell.svg, update-available.svg, up-to-date.svg, changelog.svg), generated in parallel.

outOfScope: src/eval-server/** (no new routes, no route changes)
